name: Angel Hair Pasta with Tomato-Scallop Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add onion, bell pepper, and garlic. Sauté until the vegetables are tender but not browned.
3. Stir in diced tomatoes, oregano, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil for 1 minute.
4. Reduce heat and let simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Gently add the scallops and continue cooking for an additional 3 minutes.
6. Serve hot over cooked Angel hair pasta. Top with grated Parmesan cheese if desired.
